subworkflows.name: Resolve Bulk From Slab By Bulk ID
Resolve Bulk From Slab By Build

units.name: assign-crystal
units.value: (((SLAB.metadata.get('build') or [{}])[-1].get('configuration') or {}).get( 'stack_components' ) or [{}])[0].get('crystal') if SLAB.metadata else None

units.name: assign-bulk-query
units.value: {'scaledHash': LAST_BUILD_CRYSTAL.get('scaledHash')} if LAST_BUILD_CRYSTAL and LAST_BUILD_CRYSTAL.get('scaledHash') else {'hash': LAST_BUILD_CRYSTAL.get('hash')} if LAST_BUILD_CRYSTAL and LAST_BUILD_CRYSTAL.get('hash') else None

units.name: assert-bulk-query
units.errorMessage: Surface slab build metadata does not carry a crystal scaledHash or hash. Upload the bulk material and run its total energy workflow first.

units.name: assert-bulk
units.errorMessage: No bulk material matched the resolved slab build metadata query. Upload the bulk material and run its total energy workflow first.

units.name: assert-e-bulk
units.errorMessage: Bulk total energy does not exist for the resolved bulk material. Run a bulk total energy workflow first.

template.content:
ISMEAR = 0
SIGMA  = 0.05
LORBIT = 11
# To avoid errors with high precision structures: "internal error in subroutine SGRCON"
SYMPREC = 1e-6
template.name: INCAR
KPOINTS

name: Resolve Bulk From Slab By Bulk ID
Resolve Bulk From Slab By Build
